titleStmt.title: SII 9.286: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 286. (A.R. No. 471 of 1914.) ON A SECOND SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

summary.p: This is not dated and incomplete. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and states that the hundred-and-twenty Mahājanas of Gaṇḍarādityana-Poḷal, together with (?) Kōylūḷidēva, their servant, made a grant of 100 kambas of land for the service of the god Kōlēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī . namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya ṣaṁbhavē . saṁgamada Ēciseṭṭiyar
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvana
malladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire © svasti
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇaja
pasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadagrahāra gaṇḍa
rādityanapoḷala Ūroḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁ nūṟi
ppadiṁbaru . svasti samastaguṇasaṁpannaru nuḍidaṁtegaṁḍaru
calake dhurīṇaru piridittu maṟevaru
ma kārādhya
sujanacintā
maṇi caturbhbhāṣāviṣaya
birudatriṇētra parivabhaṁḍiyaṁ
kāliṁ kōvaru maṇalaṁ saravi posevaru beṭṭeṟimittugareva
ru javana �voseyaṁ kīḷuvaru māriyaloḍakoṁḍalāḍuva
ru Obaṁgibaraṁ kolluvaru Āḷigāḷdanaṁ kolvaru tappe ta
ppuvaru bagideṁtumoppuvaru gaṇikāmanōjanaru
nāgavaḷḷīlabdhavaraprasādaru śivapādaśēkhararu
śrīmadgaṇḍarādityanahoḷala nūṟippadiṁbara śrīpādārā
dhakarumappa Ugura mūnūrvvara kōylūḷidēva ©
nūṟippadiṁbaru kōlēsvaradēvarige gauḍageṟe
yoḷage nūṟu kaṁba gadeyaṁ biṭṭaru nivēdyakke
© svasti samastaguṇasampannarappa śrīvaccagōtraIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 9.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
